启动VR遥操：
uv run python ./third_party/XLeVR/vr_controller_panda_simple.py \
  -e TurnGlobeValve-v1 \
  --record-dir /home/firedust/mimic/maniskill_myws/data/hdf5-trajectory

重放轨迹：
针对Riverdust的环境：先
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$CONDA_PREFIX/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH
再
python scripts/run_maniskill_demo.py mani_skill.trajectory.replay_trajectory \
  --traj-path /home/firedust/mimic/maniskill_myws/third_party/XLeVR/demos2/OpenSafeDoor-v22/teleop/trajectory.h5 \
  --obs-mode rgb \
  --target-control-mode pd_ee_delta_pose \
  --save-video \
  --save-traj \
  --use-first-env-state

进入 merge 状态:
git merge origin/main --no-commit --no-ff

merge 之后，有些内容被删了，但想恢复成 merge 前:
检查有没有冲突:
git status
手动恢复想保留的内容:
git checkout HEAD -- 路径
例如：git checkout HEAD -- src/maniskill_myws/assets/door/urdf/door.urdf

git add .
git commit -m "新的提交"

查看numpy版本：python -c "import numpy as np; print(np.__version__)"

python scripts/run_maniskill_demo.py mani_skill.trajectory.replay_trajectory \
  --traj-path /home/firedust/mimic/maniskill_myws/third_party/XLeVR/demos2/OpenSafeDoor-v22/teleop/trajectory.h5 \
  --obs-mode rgb \
  --target-control-mode pd_ee_delta_pose \
  --save-traj \
  --use_env_states
